name: planning
description: Seven-skill pipeline that turns a vague idea into executed work and keeps the project's contracts honest: brainstorming validates the design via question-driven exploration, planning-projects produces a staged plan with phase gates and Red-Green cycles (reconciling backlog and workflow specs at research time), executing-plans drives the plan with stage-gate checks, opens/closes backlog entries, and audits workflow specs at close-out, dispatching-parallel-agents fans out independent tasks marked Parallel YES, no-fafo-debugging enforces evidence-first root-cause analysis when plans hit failures, backlog owns the deferred-work register at docs/backlog.md, and workflow-spec owns the behavior contracts at docs/workflows/ used to detect regressions after change. Skills hand off to each other and were designed as a unit.
